backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing user profile management, crypto market data types (capital flows, projections, regional flows), and access-controlled endpoints using a mixin authorization pattern.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (PWA installation flow, responsive crypto dashboard, real-time Binance data) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON index providing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/ANDROID_APK_BUILD_GUIDE.md: Step-by-step Portuguese-language guide for packaging the web app as a native Android APK using Capacitor, listing prerequisites like Android Studio and JDK 11.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file defining Tailwind base/components/utilities and OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including sidebar and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the CryptoFlow Intelligence PWA with full PWA meta tags, Apple touch icons, manifest link, and viewport-fit=cover for notch support.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest declaring standalone display mode, Portuguese locale, multiple icon sizes with maskable variants, screenshots, and app shortcuts for market and capital flow tabs.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component providing React Query context, lazy-loaded tab surfaces (Bubbles, Capital Flow, Confluence, Futures), and a fixed mobile bottom navigation bar with desktop header tabs.
A card component that displays a cryptocurrency asset's price, 24h change, volume, a mini sparkline chart, and a trend indicator using live Binance ticker data.
frontend/src/components/BinanceCredentia: A settings panel for saving, removing, and testing Binance API credentials, with security notices and status indicators for whether credentials are configured.
frontend/src/components/BubbleDetailPane: A slide-in detail panel that shows enriched asset data (price, trend, confluence scores, chart) for a selected bubble asset, with backdrop overlay and animated entry.
frontend/src/components/BubbleVisualizat: A 3D React Three Fiber canvas that renders floating bubble assets with orbit controls, lighting, and fog, and shows a BubbleDetailPanel when a bubble is clicked.
Displays detected confluence zones sorted by intensity, falling back to synthetic zones generated from live Binance market data when backend data is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/FloatingBubble.t: A 3D animated sphere mesh representing a crypto asset bubble, with organic floating motion, hover scaling, fade-in, and visual properties mapped from convergence and trend data.
frontend/src/components/FlowVisualizatio: Displays capital flow data between assets using animated visualizations, generating synthetic flows from live Binance data when backend data is unavailable, and producing an interpretation summary of dominant market movements.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a footer with a dynamic Binance connection status indicator and a copyright notice with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/FuturesDashboard: Dashboard component that checks for Binance API credentials and displays account balances and open futures positions with auto-refresh polling and error handling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with logo, desktop tab navigation (Mercado, Fluxo, Confluências, Order Flow), a live/polling/offline connection indicator, PWA install button, and login button.
Bottom-sheet modal that guides iOS Safari users through the three steps to add the app to their home screen as a PWA.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/OpenPositionsTab: Renders a card-based table of normalized Binance futures positions with PnL, leverage, entry price, liquidation price, and per-position risk insights/warnings.
frontend/src/components/order-flow/Alert: Scrollable panel that lists order flow alerts with severity-based styling, a clear-all button, and an empty state, wrapped in an OrderFlowSection container.
frontend/src/components/order-flow/Confl: Scrollable panel that displays detected confluence events with directional icons and severity badges, wrapped in an OrderFlowSection container with an empty state fallback.
frontend/src/components/order-flow/Order: A compact controls bar component for the Order Flow Monitor that renders market selection buttons (Futures/Spot), a polling toggle switch, last-updated badge, refresh button, and settings button.
frontend/src/components/order-flow/order: Centralized constant object containing all English UI strings used throughout the Order Flow Monitor, including labels, messages, error text, and a helper function for alert count formatting.
frontend/src/components/order-flow/Order: A reusable Card-based section wrapper for the Order Flow Monitor that displays a title with an optional icon and badge alongside arbitrary child content.
A responsive grid component that renders a list of labeled stat items with optional icons in 2, 3, or 4 columns depending on the `columns` prop.
frontend/src/components/OrderFlowErrorBo: React class-based error boundary for the Order Flow Monitor that catches runtime errors and renders a fallback UI with retry and reload buttons, plus troubleshooting tips sourced from a copy file.
frontend/src/components/OrderFlowMonitor: Main Order Flow Monitor component that fetches real-time BTC order flow data via Binance hooks, computes rolling stats, confluence events, and alerts, and renders them through sub-components with configurable thresholds persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup that collects name and optional email, then saves the profile via a mutation hook and shows toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallButton: Button component that handles PWA installation by capturing the beforeinstallprompt event for Android/desktop or showing an iOS-specific install modal, hiding itself when already in standalone mode.
frontend/src/components/TrendChart.tsx: Recharts-based area chart component that displays price trend data either fetched by symbol via a custom hook or passed directly as props, with optional axes, tooltip, and bullish/bearish color coding.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAssetDetailData.ts: A React Query hook that fetches capital flow, confluence zone, and live Binance market data for a given asset, combining them into a single `AssetDetailData` object.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceData.ts: A module-level singleton hook that manages a global Binance WebSocket connection with REST polling fallback, exposing ticker data both as a keyed map and a legacy array format to consumers.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceFuturesMoni: A collection of React Query hooks and mutations for managing Binance API credentials, testing the connection, and reading/saving the caller's user profile via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceHistoricalD: A React Query hook that fetches historical Binance candlestick (kline) data for a given symbol and interval, with retry logic and a 5-minute stale time.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceOrderFlow.t: React hook that polls Binance public market data (24h ticker, recent trades, book ticker) at a configurable interval, using fingerprint comparison to avoid unnecessary state updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useBubbleAssets.ts: React Query hook that fetches bubble assets from the ICP backend and enriches them with live Binance price/volume data, falling back to synthetic bubbles derived from market movers when no backend data exists.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useOpenFuturesPositio: React Query hook that fetches open Binance futures positions from the ICP backend actor, with optional polling and user-friendly error mapping for credential/auth failures.
frontend/src/hooks/useOrderFlowStableMem: Hook that exposes ref-based mutable memory (previous spread, stats, price, rolling averages) for the Order Flow Monitor without triggering React re-renders.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAUpdateToast.ts: Hook that checks for available PWA service worker updates on mount and periodically, showing a persistent Sonner toast with an option to activate the update.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks (capital flows, confluence zones, recovery assets, regional data) that fetch data from the ICP backend actor and enrich it with live Binance market data.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendChartData.ts: Hook that fetches 4-hour Binance historical kline data for a given symbol and transforms it into chart-ready data points with formatted date strings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a dark-only neon crypto theme using Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for colors and spacing, and adds utility classes for PWA safe areas, scrollbar hiding, slide-up animations, and neon glow effects.
frontend/src/lib/binanceDomains.ts: Centralized configuration file exporting base URLs for Binance Spot REST, Futures REST, and Futures WebSocket public endpoints, with notes clarifying these are for public market data only.
frontend/src/lib/binanceHistoricalServic: Service for fetching historical candlestick (kline) data from the Binance public REST API, including a retry wrapper with exponential backoff and response parsing into a typed KlineData format.
frontend/src/lib/binanceOrderFlowRest.ts: REST client for fetching public Binance market data (24h ticker, recent trades, book ticker) for both spot and futures markets, with input validation and AbortSignal support.
frontend/src/lib/binanceService.ts: Binance public market data service providing REST ticker fetching, a whitelisted symbol list, and a WebSocket client class that streams real-time ticker data with automatic reconnection logic.
frontend/src/lib/bookConfluence.ts: Order book confluence analysis library that calculates spread metrics, determines bid/ask trend direction, and detects confluence events where trade flow imbalance aligns with order book movements.
frontend/src/lib/bubbleLayout.ts: Utility library for computing 3D spherical bubble positions using the golden ratio, and deriving per-symbol animation properties (speed, amplitude, phase offset) via deterministic string hashing.
frontend/src/lib/bubbleVisualMapping.ts: Provides utility functions to map convergence metrics and trend direction to visual properties (bubble size, colors, glow intensity) for 3D bubble chart rendering.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Exports number formatting utilities for Portuguese (pt-BR) locale, including currency, percentage, compact (K/M/B), and two-decimal rounding helpers.
frontend/src/lib/futuresPositionFormat.t: Provides formatting and color-coding helpers for displaying Binance futures position data such as price, PnL, leverage, liquidation price, and market type badges.
frontend/src/lib/orderFlowAlerts.ts: Implements an alert system that generates proxy notifications for liquidation events, volume spikes, and spread anomalies based on rolling order flow and book spread metrics.
frontend/src/lib/orderFlowAnalysis.ts: Provides order flow analysis utilities including trade classification by aggressor side, rolling window statistics calculation, and large trade cluster detection.
frontend/src/lib/orderFlowFingerprint.ts: Generates and compares lightweight fingerprints from order flow data (ticker price, book bid/ask, recent trade IDs) to detect meaningful changes and avoid unnecessary UI updates.
frontend/src/lib/positionInsights.ts: Analyzes normalized futures positions to generate actionable insights (high PnL, liquidation risk, entry distance, volatility) with severity levels and associated display helpers.
frontend/src/lib/projections.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/lib/pwaUtils.ts: Provides PWA utility functions for detecting platform/environment (iOS, Android, standalone, secure context) and managing service worker installation prompts and updates.
frontend/src/lib/symbols.ts: Defines a whitelist of supported Binance trading symbols and exports a helper to normalize and match symbol strings regardless of USDT suffix formatting.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/service-worker.ts: PWA service worker that precaches critical static assets on install, cleans old caches on activate, and applies a network-first strategy for Binance/ICP requests and cache-first for all other static assets.
frontend/src/surfaces/BubbleVisualizatio: Tab surface that displays a live price ticker for top crypto symbols, a toggleable lazy-loaded 3D bubble visualization, and a responsive grid of asset detail cards.
frontend/src/surfaces/CapitalFlowTabSurf: Simple tab surface wrapper that renders the FlowVisualization component for the capital flow tab.
frontend/src/surfaces/ConfluenceZonesTab: Simple tab surface wrapper that renders the ConfluenceZones component for the confluence zones tab.
frontend/src/surfaces/FuturesMonitorTabS: Tab surface that sets up QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and a full-page layout with header and footer to host the OrderFlowMonitor component with error boundary and reset support.
frontend/src/utils/safeJson.ts: Provides safe JSON parsing and typed validation/merging utilities for localStorage-backed settings including OrderFlow, Confluence, and Alert thresholds.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom neon color palette, Space Grotesk/JetBrains Mono fonts, custom animations, and plugins for animate, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking schema version, feature list, known issues, and architectural notes for a PWA cryptocurrency market analysis dashboard with Binance real-time data.
